issues.title: [P4B-01] Add sparse activity matrix backend
issues.objective: Enable memory-safe activity matrix generation for high-dimensional assay spaces.
tasks: Add sparse output mode to pc_activity_matrix()
Support Matrix::dgCMatrix as optional output type
Add coercion helper to dense tibble for downstream compatibility
acceptance_tests: 10k compounds x 5k assays builds without out-of-memory on CI benchmark profile
Sparse and dense outputs have identical non-missing values on a shared fixture
Existing dense output contract remains backward-compatible

issues.title: [P4B-02] Implement activity outcome harmonization
issues.objective: Standardize assay activity outcome labels to stable numeric encodings.
tasks: Add pc_activity_outcome_map() with default controlled vocabulary
Allow user-defined overrides and strict mode
Integrate mapping in pc_assay_activity_long() and pc_activity_matrix()
acceptance_tests: Known synonyms of Active/Inactive/Inconclusive map deterministically
Strict mode fails with explicit error on unknown labels
Custom maps override defaults without side effects

issues.title: [P4B-03] Add resumable batch checkpoints
issues.objective: Resume interrupted high-throughput jobs without re-fetching completed chunks.
tasks: Implement checkpoint manifest for pc_batch() runs
Add pc_resume_batch() helper
Attach run metadata and failure summaries
acceptance_tests: Interrupted run resumes and completes only pending chunks
Checkpoint replay yields same outputs as uninterrupted execution
Corrupt checkpoint detection returns actionable error message

issues.title: [P4B-04] Add benchmark harness for 10/1k/100k scale tests
issues.objective: Provide repeatable performance and memory benchmarks for core workflows.
tasks: Add benchmark fixture generator and reporting utility
Persist benchmark snapshots in CI artifacts
Document pass/fail thresholds
acceptance_tests: Benchmark suite emits latency/memory summary for each scenario
Regression threshold breach fails benchmark job
Benchmark output can be consumed in markdown report

issues.title: [P5-01] Implement cross-domain graph schema and edge builders
issues.objective: Represent CID/SID/AID/Target relations as explicit graph entities and edges.
tasks: Add pc_graph_build() with typed node and edge tables
Add pc_graph_edges() selectors by edge type
Include namespace and source metadata on each edge
acceptance_tests: Graph contains expected node/edge counts on fixture dataset
Edge tables preserve input identifiers and namespaces
Graph build is deterministic across repeated runs

issues.title: [P5-02] Add provenance-aware cross-domain joins
issues.objective: Ensure every joined record exposes auditable lineage metadata.
tasks: Extend pc_cross_domain_join() with provenance columns
Add source endpoint, timestamp, and transform metadata
Implement conflict policy options for many-to-many merges
acceptance_tests: Output rows include required provenance fields
Conflict policies produce documented and tested behavior
Join invariants validated by snapshot tests

issues.title: [P5-03] Build target-centric activity profile helper
issues.objective: Provide target-level summaries over compound bioactivity.
tasks: Add pc_target_activity_profile()
Support aggregation by target gene/protein accession
Return tidy summary with activity statistics and counts
acceptance_tests: Profiles return stable summary columns across fixtures
Aggregations match hand-verified expected values
Function handles missing target metadata gracefully

issues.title: [P5-04] Implement paged/async graph query planner
issues.objective: Plan and execute staged graph retrieval with async/listkey support.
tasks: Add query plan object for cross-domain traversal
Integrate pc_submit()/pc_poll()/pc_collect() where needed
Add resumable execution with per-stage checkpoints
acceptance_tests: Planner executes staged retrieval with equivalent results to direct retrieval
Async stages recover from transient failure using retries
Plan object can be serialized and resumed

issues.title: [P6-01] Harden rcdk bridge with validation contract
issues.objective: Stabilize molecular conversion behavior for rcdk integration.
tasks: Add schema validation before conversion
Capture conversion diagnostics and failures per row
Document conversion expectations and edge cases
acceptance_tests: Valid SMILES rows convert successfully with retained IDs
Invalid rows return structured diagnostics without aborting batch
Conversion output is deterministic on fixture inputs

issues.title: [P6-02] Harden ChemmineR bridge with validation contract
issues.objective: Stabilize SDF conversion behavior for ChemmineR workflows.
tasks: Add pre-flight checks for required fields
Add partial-failure mode and diagnostics table
Add tests for missing/invalid optional dependency behavior
acceptance_tests: Conversion succeeds on valid fixture and fails clearly on invalid rows
Partial-failure mode preserves successful rows
Dependency-missing path is tested and documented

issues.title: [P6-03] Add Bioconductor container bridge
issues.objective: Enable export to Bioconductor-compatible assay containers.
tasks: Add converter to SummarizedExperiment-like structure
Map feature matrix, sample metadata, and provenance fields
Add round-trip consistency tests
acceptance_tests: Converted container dimensions match source matrix and metadata
Provenance is present in row/column metadata
Round-trip export/import preserves key identifiers

issues.title: [P6-04] Add ML recipe and feature schema validators
issues.objective: Guarantee stable model input schemas across pipeline runs.
tasks: Add pc_feature_schema_validate() for type and name checks
Add pc_ml_recipe() helper for common preprocessing pipeline
Add schema drift detection report between runs
acceptance_tests: Schema validator catches missing/renamed feature columns
Recipe helper emits deterministic output on fixture
Drift report highlights added/removed/type-changed columns

issues.title: [P7-01] Build Shiny workflow builder MVP
issues.objective: Expose key retrieval-to-model pipeline steps through a minimal Shiny interface.
tasks: Create modular UI for query, matrix build, and export
Bind UI actions to pc_* pipeline functions
Add session-level run log and download artifacts
acceptance_tests: User can run similarity -> matrix -> export workflow from UI
UI handles API failure with structured error messages
Exported artifacts match scripted pipeline outputs

issues.title: [P7-02] Implement cloud execution profile v2
issues.objective: Provide stable defaults for high-latency and distributed execution contexts.
tasks: Refine pc_profile('cloud') with tested defaults
Add timeout/retry/rate presets for queue environments
Document profile behavior and intended constraints
acceptance_tests: Cloud profile has lower failure rate under injected latency
Profile values are versioned and snapshot tested
Local and cloud profiles produce equivalent data outputs

issues.title: [P7-03] Add pluggable cache provider interface
issues.objective: Allow memory/disk/remote cache providers under a common contract.
tasks: Define cache provider interface (get/set/clear/info)
Implement local default provider adapter
Add stub adapter for remote/object-store style caches
acceptance_tests: All providers satisfy common contract tests
Cache keys remain deterministic across providers
Offline replay works through provider abstraction

issues.title: [P7-04] Add run telemetry and audit report
issues.objective: Capture reproducibility and reliability metadata for every pipeline run.
tasks: Add PubChemRunReport object
Record request counts, retries, failures, cache hit ratio, duration
Expose summary printer and export helper
acceptance_tests: Run report includes required metrics for each execution
Report export is machine-readable and reproducible
Telemetry does not change core data outputs

issues.title: [P8-01] Publish lifecycle and deprecation policy
issues.objective: Define enforceable API stability and deprecation windows.
tasks: Finalize lifecycle policy document
Add deprecation helper with standardized warnings
Map each public API to a stability tier
acceptance_tests: All public functions have explicit lifecycle tags
Deprecation warnings follow documented format
Policy document is linked from README and NEWS

issues.title: [P8-02] Add compatibility matrix and migration guides
issues.objective: Provide versioned compatibility guarantees and upgrade playbooks.
tasks: Publish compatibility matrix for core integrations
Write migration guides for legacy to next-gen API users
Add breaking-change tracker for v3 preparation
acceptance_tests: Matrix covers supported R versions and key package integrations
Migration examples execute successfully on CI
Breaking-change tracker is complete for open roadmap items

issues.title: [P8-03] Add API contract snapshot test suite
issues.objective: Prevent undocumented contract drift for public APIs.
tasks: Create snapshot fixtures for key public outputs
Add schema assertions for metadata and class contracts
Gate merges on contract test stability
acceptance_tests: Contract tests fail on intentional schema drift
Approved contract updates require explicit snapshot refresh
Coverage includes retrieval, batch, matrix, export, and graph APIs

issues.title: [P8-04] Prepare v3.0 release dossier and checklist
issues.objective: Assemble release-quality evidence for a flagship v3 launch.
tasks: Create v3 release checklist with pass/fail gates
Assemble reproducibility dossier and benchmark summary
Draft release notes and migration highlights
acceptance_tests: All release gates have pass evidence linked
Dossier reproduces key workflows on clean environment
Release notes enumerate all user-impacting changes
